privileged_info_summary: This task operates on the iDempiere 12 GardenWorld demo dataset, which is a well-documented, standard demonstration environment included with iDempiere for training and testing. The metadata specifies creating a Physical Inventory document with description 'Year-End Count Q4 2024' in the 'HQ' warehouse with movement date 2024-12-31 and three inventory lines: Azalea Bush (qty 150), Elm Tree (qty 75), and Patio Set (qty 30). All metadata values are verified to match the task description exactly. The products (Azalea Bush, Elm Tree, Patio Set) are consistent with GardenWorld's garden-themed product catalog, with 'Azalea' products confirmed in iDempiere training materials. The data is synthetic demo data, not real-world business data. All claimed values are accurate and consistent with iDempiere's standard Physical Inventory functionality and GardenWorld demo dataset structure.
